title: Futures Waver After Stocks Notch Best Month Since 2020; Apple Earnings | Bloomberg Brief 5/1/2026
title_cn: 股市创下 2020 年以来最佳月份表现后，期货出现波动；苹果财报|彭博简报 2026 年 5 月 1 日
summary: US equity futures waver after stocks hit another record high, posting their best month since 2020. Apple delivers a surprisingly strong revenue forecast, despite a shortage of MacBooks. President Trump vows to maintain a naval blockade on Iran. Seema Shah of Principal Asset Management discusses this earnings season. Jason Gabelman of TD Cowen looks ahead to Exxon and Chevron results. (Source: Bloomberg)

title: Shopify Analyst Who Saw Selloff Coming Says It’s Too Soon to Buy

title: Exxon, Chevron Beat Earnings Estimates as Oil Prices Surge

title: KMT's Cheng Li-wun on US Visit, Peace and Defense Budget

summary: Cheng Li-wun confirms Beijing's positive response to her planned US visit and calls Trump "unpredictable," emphasizing peace and free trade as paramount for Taiwan. She clarifies KMT's defense spending stance, rejecting "blank checks" for the DPP while supporting US arms purchases, also comments on Japan PM Takaichi's "provocative" remarks on Taiwan. (Source: Bloomberg)

title: Exxon Profit Surprises Analysts Despite Iran War’s Tumult

summary: Analysts doubt that intervention can do more than briefly stabilize markets.

title: Wall Street Is Bullish on Oracle, But Investors Aren’t Buying It
title_cn: 华尔街看好甲骨文，但投资者并不买账
summary: To Wall Street, Oracle Corp. is a screaming buy. To many investors, however, the company’s relationship with OpenAI, its sizable debt load and the durability of its software business have made owning the stock a risk.

title: Japan Likely Spent About $34.5 Billion on Yen Intervention
title_cn: 日本可能花费约 345 亿美元干预日元
summary: Japan likely spent around $34.5 billion Thursday in its first currency intervention to prop up the yen since July 2024, according to a Bloomberg analysis of central bank accounts.

title: Bolivia apuesta por el turismo para reactivar su economía y atraer divisas

summary: Conocida desde hace tiempo por la minería y los combustibles fósiles, esta nación andina apuesta ahora por sus recursos naturales como forma de atraer a visitantes extranjeros —y divisas fuertes—.

title: Bolivia Seeks a $3 Billion Tourism Boost to Revive Its Crumbling Economy
title_cn: 玻利维亚寻求 30 亿美元的旅游业刺激以重振其摇摇欲坠的经济
summary: Long known for mining and fossil fuels, the Andean nation is now eyeing its natural resources as a way to attract foreign visitors — and hard currency.

title: Ares Earnings Miss Estimates Despite Record Fundraising Haul
title_cn: 尽管筹款量创纪录，但阿瑞斯的盈利仍低于预期
summary: Ares Management Corp., facing a slump in dealmaking while navigating broader market turmoil, reported first-quarter earnings that missed Wall Street estimates even as wealthy clients helped fuel a record $30 billion of fundraising during the period.

title: US Markets Well Positioned to Contain Iran Conflict Impact, Says Seema Shah
title_cn: 西玛·沙阿 (Seema Shah) 表示，美国市场有能力遏制伊朗冲突的影响
summary: Seema Shah, chief global strategist at Principal Asset Management, says earnings suggest there isn’t as much exposure to the conflict with Iran as expected and sees US markets being able to keep the impacts “quite contained.” (Source: Bloomberg)

title: Emerging Markets Eke Out Gains in Thin-Volume Holiday Trading
title_cn: 新兴市场在假日交易量清淡中勉强获利
summary: Emerging-market benchmarks for stocks and currencies posted small gains in holiday-thinned trade, with most markets in Asia, Europe and Africa closed for Labour Day.

title: UK Billionaire’s Family Office Targets More Private Equity Exits
title_cn: 英国亿万富翁家族办公室瞄准更多私募股权退出

summary: Oil held a second weekly gain as US President Donald Trump said he was sticking with a naval blockade of Iranian ports and was briefed on further military options.

title: India’s Heat Exposes a Fragile Grid as Energy Crunch Deepens
title_cn: 随着能源紧缩的加剧，印度的高温暴露了脆弱的电网
summary: India is preparing for a blistering summer until monsoon rains arrive in June, with above-normal heat already straining power grids at a time when the country is grappling with energy shortages.

title: Aluminum Gains as Trump Vows to Maintain Naval Blockade on Iran
title_cn: 特朗普誓言维持对伊朗的海军封锁，铝价上涨
summary: Aluminum gained, with traders seeing little prospect of an imminent opening of the Strait of Hormuz that would ease availability of the metal.

title: Singapore PM Warns of AI Disruptions, Vows to Support Workers

summary: Singapore Prime Minister Lawrence Wong warned of bigger disruptions ahead as the country navigates a more uncertain global environment, from the Iran conflict to the rapid rise of artificial intelligence.

title: Hungary Releases Terms of €1 Billion Orban-Era China Loan
title_cn: 匈牙利公布欧尔班时代10亿欧元中国贷款条款
summary: Hungary has released previously undisclosed details of a €1 billion ($1.2 billion) loan that outgoing Prime Minister Viktor Orban’s government took from China in 2024, news website 444.hu reported Friday.

title: US Economy Is in 'Fine Shape,' Marathon's Richards Says
title_cn: 马拉松运动员理查兹表示，美国经济状况“良好”
summary: Bruce Richards, Marathon Asset Management CEO, co-founder and chairman, says the US economy is "in good shape." Speaking on Bloomberg Television, he adds that consumer consumption looks "rock solid." Richards also discusses the impact prolonged elevated oil prices could have on the economic situation and growth.  (Source: Bloomberg)

title: Energy Prices Underpin Strong Outlook for Japan’s Trading Houses
title_cn: 能源价格支撑日本贸易公司的强劲前景
summary: Japan’s big five trading houses are set to benefit from war-related supply disruptions this year, with higher energy and metals prices driving stronger earnings.

title: Nagel Favors ECB June Hike Unless Outlook Improves Markedly
title_cn: 内格尔赞成欧洲央行六月加息，除非前景显着改善
summary: The European Central Bank will need to increase interest rates in June if there isn’t a significant change in the outlook, according to Bundesbank President Joachim Nagel.

title_cn: 台湾如何成为世界上最危险的地缘政治咽喉要地

summary: Months before Jamie Dimon’s infamous remark about more than one “cockroach” lurking in credit markets, TCW Group Inc. Chief Executive Officer Katie Koch warned the direct lending industry was due for a reckoning.

title: Nvidia, Microsoft, AWS Expanding Classified Military AI Use
title_cn: Nvidia、微软、AWS 扩大机密军事人工智能的使用
summary: The Pentagon has struck agreements with four more technology companies for expansive use of advanced artificial intelligence tools on classified military networks, according to a Defense Department statement and two defense officials briefed on the matter.

title: S&P Set for Best Month Since 2020, Apple Beats Earnings | The Close 4/30/2026
title_cn: 标准普尔创下 2020 年以来最佳月份业绩，苹果公司业绩好于预期收盘价 2026 年 4 月 30 日
summary: Bloomberg Television brings you the latest news and analysis leading up to the final minutes and seconds before and after the closing bell on Wall Street. Today's guests are Man Group’s Matt Rowe, Investment Company Institute’s Eric Pan, Needham’s Laura Martin, Netomi CEO Puneet Mehta & WndrCo’s Jeffrey Katzenberg, Former Minneapolis Fed President Gary Stern, Kayne Anderson Rudnick’s Julie Biel, Thornburg’s Christian Hoffmann, Seaport Research Partners’ Jay Goldberg, Christian & Timbers CEO Jeff Christian, IDC’s Nabila Popal, & BMO’s Kristin Milchanowski. (Source: Bloomberg)

title: Uber Acquires Rival FlyTaxi in Hong Kong Push, Sing Tao Reports
title_cn: 据《星岛日报》报道，Uber 在香港收购了竞争对手 FlyTaxi
summary: Uber Technologies Inc. has agreed to acquire Hong Kong’s FlyTaxi as part of its expansion plans in the city, Sing Tao Daily reported, citing an announcement by the US-based company.

title: Roblox Shares Tumble After Safety Features Slow User Growth
title_cn: 安全功能用户增长放缓后 Roblox 股价暴跌
summary: Roblox Corp. reported first-quarter users that fell short of analysts’ expectations after implementing safety features restricting how kids, who make up a majority of its audience, can use the platform.

title: Apple Forecast Tops Estimates Even as Mac Shortages Linger
title_cn: 尽管 Mac 短缺问题依然存在，但苹果的预测仍高于预期
summary: Apple Inc. delivered a surprisingly strong revenue forecast for the third quarter, even as it warned that memory-chip costs will increase and that shortages of Mac computers will persist for “several months.”

title: OpenAI CFO Sees ‘Vertical Wall of Demand’ for Products
title_cn: OpenAI 首席财务官看到了产品的“垂直需求墙”
summary: OpenAI Chief Financial Officer Sarah Friar pushed back on concerns about missing internal targets, saying the company is meeting objectives and sees “a vertical wall of demand” for its products.

title: Apple Sales Forecast Beats Estimates
title_cn: 苹果销售预测好于预期
summary: Apple delivered a strong revenue forecast for the third quarter, with sales expected to rise 14% to 17% in the period. The company warned that memory-chip costs will increase and that shortages of Mac computers will persist for "several months." Bloomberg Intelligence's Matthew Bloxham breaks down the situation. (Source: Bloomberg)

title: Toto Shares Surge on Plans to Boost Chip Parts Business
title_cn: Toto 计划推动芯片零部件业务，股价飙升
summary: Toto Ltd. shares soared as much as 18%, the most on record, in Tokyo after the toilet maker said it plans to ramp up investment in its chip components business due to strong AI demand.

title: Economic Crosscurrents Go Global as Energy Shock Meets AI Wave
title_cn: 能源冲击遇上人工智能浪潮，经济逆流走向全球
summary: The global economy is increasingly captive to two opposing forces.

title: Apple Delivers Strong Forecast in Sign It’s Weathering Shortages
title_cn: 苹果公司发布强劲预测，表明其正在经受短缺的考验
summary: Apple delivered a surprisingly strong revenue forecast for the third quarter, benefiting from new products launched in March, including the MacBook Neo and updated iPad Air. Ed Ludlow has more. (Source: Bloomberg)

title: The Key Takeaways From Apple's Q2 Earnings Beat
title_cn: 苹果第二季度盈利的主要要点
summary: Apple delivered second-quarter revenue that edged past analysts’ estimates, helped by demand for the iPhone and Mac. Ed Ludlow reacts to the earnings report on "Bloomberg The Close." (Source: Bloomberg)

title: AI Debt Investors Show Fatigue After $300 Billion Binge
title_cn: AI 债务投资者在 3000 亿美元的狂欢之后表现出疲劳
summary: After a $300 billion AI debt binge that spanned every corner of the credit market, investors are starting to show some signs of fatigue.

title: Apple Tops Sales Estimates After iPhone, Mac Help Fuel Growth
title_cn: iPhone、Mac 推动增长后，苹果销量突破预期
summary:
Apple Inc. reported revenue for the fiscal second quarter that topped analysts’ estimates, helped by demand for the iPhone and Mac. 
Revenue jumped 17% to $111.2 billion during the period, which ended March 28, the company said in a statement Thursday. Analysts had expected $109.7 billion. Apple itself had projected sales growth of 13% to 16%. Bloomberg's Anurag Rana and Ed Ludlow join to break it down. (Source: Bloomberg)

title: How a Secretive Trading Empire Is Taking Over Wall Street
title_cn: 秘密交易帝国如何接管华尔街
summary: High frequency trading has transformed Wall Street into a world of algorithms. No firm captures the digital upheaval quite like Jane Street. Many are wondering what’s behind its unprecedented success.  (Source: Bloomberg)

title: Apple’s Memory Strategy Is Good Move: Seaport’s Goldberg
title_cn: 苹果的内存策略是个好举措：Seaport 的 Goldberg
summary: Jay Goldberg, Seaport Research Partners semiconductors and electronics senior analyst, reacts to Apple’s fiscal second-quarter results. Speaking on “Bloomberg The Close,” Goldberg says memory prices could put pressure on Apple’s gross margins.

title: Meta Sells $25 Billion of Debt as Investor Worry, Fatigue Builds
title_cn: 由于投资者担忧和疲劳加剧，Meta 出售 250 亿美元债务
summary: Meta Platforms Inc. sold $25 billion of investment-grade bonds, hitting the market with a jumbo deal for the second time in six months as investors are starting to show some signs of fatigue.

title: AI Payoff in Focus During Tech Earnings Bonanza | Bloomberg Tech 4/30/2026
title_cn: 人工智能收益成为科技盈利繁荣期间的焦点 |彭博科技 2026 年 4 月 30 日
summary:
Bloomberg’s Caroline Hyde and Ed Ludlow discuss tech earnings as Alphabet and Amazon see a clear payoff from their AI spending, while Meta lags behind. Plus, Anthropic has begun weighing a fresh funding round that would value the AI developer at more than $900 billion. And, Stripe President John Collison discusses the company's new AI tools and partnership with Google.
 (Source: Bloomberg)

title: Meta Shares Plunge on Rising Concern About AI Spending Spree
title_cn: 由于对人工智能支出热潮的担忧日益加剧，Meta 股价暴跌
summary: Meta Platforms Inc. shares plunged the most in six months after the company raised its spending outlook for the year, reigniting fears that the historic levels of investment that Chief Executive Officer Mark Zuckerberg is making to catch up in the artificial intelligence race won’t pay off.

title: Alphabet Soars After Strong Sales Signal AI Bets Paying Off
title_cn: 强劲的销售信号表明人工智能押注得到回报后，Alphabet 股价飙升
summary: Alphabet Inc. shares soared 10% to a record after the company reported strong demand for its cloud and artificial intelligence offerings, signaling that unprecedented investments in AI infrastructure are paying off.

title: Alphabet, Amazon Outpace Meta in AI During Earnings Bonanza
title_cn: Alphabet、亚马逊在人工智能领域的盈利丰厚，超过了 Meta
summary: A frenzied day of earnings reports offered a glimpse at how some of the world’s biggest tech companies are doing in artificial intelligence. The upshot: Alphabet Inc.’s Google is seeing a clear payoff from its AI spending, while Meta Platforms Inc. is lagging behind.

title: Reddit Beats Sales Expectations Again on Continued Ads Growth
title_cn: Reddit 广告持续增长，销售再次超出预期
summary: Reddit Inc. projected sales in the current period that surpassed Wall Street estimates, continuing a streak of strong revenue growth powered by the company’s surging advertising business.

title: Private Credit Giants Try to Reassure Investors on AI Risks to Software Bets
title_cn: 私人信贷巨头试图安抚投资者对软件投资的人工智能风险
summary: Three of the biggest names in private credit moved to reassure investors this week about the AI risks facing their software borrowers, deploying proprietary “score cards” and outside consultants.

title: How Big Tech’s AI Ambitions Are Fueling a Borrowing Boom
title_cn: 大型科技公司的人工智能野心如何推动借贷热潮
summary: For the past few years, the largest US technology companies have been in a costly race to develop advanced artificial intelligence systems while at the same time providing computing power to a burgeoning field of startups. To chase these goals, they have radically changed how they finance their growth. Long reliant on rich revenues and share price increases, Alphabet Inc.’s Google, Meta Platforms Inc. and other tech giants now are borrowing heavily to build the technology that makes chatbots run

title: Musk Says No Contract Dictating His Early Donation to OpenAI
title_cn: 马斯克表示，没有合同规定他对 OpenAI 的早期捐赠
summary: Elon Musk acknowledged there was no contract with OpenAI regarding the terms of his donation to the company when it was first founded as a nonprofit research organization more than a decade ago.

title: Trump’s US Tariffs Turn UK Trade Surpluses Into Deficits
title_cn: 特朗普的美国关税将英国贸易顺差变成赤字
summary: President Donald Trump’s tariffs have resulted in a sharp fall in UK exports to the US, turning British trade surpluses into deficits in a dramatic reversal of transatlantic trade dynamics, according to official data.

title: GOP Steers Clear on Iran as War Hits Key 60-Day Milestone
title_cn: 随着战争达到 60 天的关键里程碑，共和党不再关注伊朗问题
summary: Trump is looking to buy more time to reach a deal, and most Republicans are glad to give it.

title: American Farmers Shun USDA Surveys as Trust in Data Erodes
title_cn: 美国农民回避美国农业部调查，因为对数据的信任受到侵蚀
summary: American farmers are ignoring US Department of Agriculture surveys in the latest sign of distrust in government data.

title: New York’s Ultra-Rich Defend Citadel’s Griffin As Penthouse Dig Turns Personal
title_cn: 纽约超级富豪捍卫 Citadel 的格里芬，顶层公寓挖掘变成私人
summary: The press release from Zohran Mamdani declaring New York City’s first pied-à-terre tax cited a $238 million penthouse in Midtown bought by one Ken Griffith.

title: Iran War: The US States Where Gas Prices Are Surging Fastest Under Trump
title_cn: 伊朗战争：特朗普治下天然气价格飙升最快的美国州
summary:
US President Donald Trump has vowed to maintain a naval blockade on Iran, reiterating that the policy is depriving the Islamic Republic of much-needed oil revenue. West Texas Intermediate, the main US crude marker, rallied toward $111 a barrel on Thursday, while Brent, the global benchmark, topped $126.

Iran’s Supreme Leader Mojtaba Khamenei cast doubt on the prospects of a deal, vowing not to give up the Islamic Republic’s nuclear or missile technologies, and signaling Tehran would keep control of the Strait of Hormuz.

The American Automobile Association says in California, the average statewide price for regular gasoline rose to $6.01, the highest since October 2023. Skyrocketing pump prices are a major political risk for President Donald Trump’s White House, especially ahead of the midterm elections.

Bloomberg's Charlie Wells explains on "The Pulse with Francine Lacqua." (Source: Bloomberg)

title: Corruption Scandals Are Plaguing Argentina’s Milei
title_cn: 腐败丑闻困扰着阿根廷米莱
summary: The libertarian president is stretching the boundaries of what voters will take.

title: How the Strait of Hormuz Has Become a Weapon of War
title_cn: 霍尔木兹海峡如何成为战争武器
summary: No region of the world produces more oil and gas than the countries straddling the Persian Gulf, and most of it needs to travel by tanker via the Strait of Hormuz.

title: Odd Lots: How Taiwan Could Become a Global Chokepoint (Podcast)
title_cn: 奇怪的事情：台湾如何成为全球的咽喉要道（播客）
summary: The closure of the Strait of Hormuz has highlighted the potential for long-running theoretical chokepoints to turn into reality, with dramatic results for both geopolitics and the global economy. But the hypothetical scenario that policymakers have arguably been losing the most sleep over for decades is the prospect of a major conflict between China and Taiwan. So how likely is it, and what would such a conflict actually look like? On this episode, we speak with Eyck Freymann, author of the new

title: Trump Vows to Maintain Pressure on Iran Through Naval Blockade
title_cn: 特朗普誓言通过海军封锁维持对伊朗施压
summary: US President Donald Trump vowed to maintain a naval blockade on Iran and was briefed by commanders on further military options, according to a report, underscoring the fragility of the ceasefire between the warring countries.

title: Oil Holds Weekly Gain as Trump Sticks With Blockade
title_cn: 特朗普坚持封锁，油价保持每周上涨
summary: Oil held its second weekly gain as US President Donald Trump said he was sticking with a naval blockade of Iranian ports. Oil has soared more than a quarter over the past two weeks as the deadlock in negotiations extends the near-total closure of the crucial waterway, which before the war carried about a fifth of the world’s crude. Bloomberg’s Anthony di Paola reports.

title: Trump Sticks With Blockade, Says It’s ‘Incredible’
title_cn: 特朗普坚持封锁，称这“令人难以置信”
summary: US President Donald Trump said he was sticking with a naval blockade of Iranian ports as concerns the vital Strait of Hormuz would not reopen anytime soon continue. “The blockade is incredible,” Trump told reporters at the White House. Bloomberg’s Stuart Livingstone-Wallace reports.

title: Why ‘India Has Lost Its Way’
title_cn: 为什么“印度迷失了方向”
summary: Author Amitav Ghosh has built a global following with novels that draw on historical research. His latest is Ghost-Eye, and it’s deeply personal, as he discusses with Mishal Husain. (Source: Bloomberg)

title: Spain’s Booming Economy Fails to Help Its Poorest Children
title_cn: 西班牙蓬勃发展的经济未能帮助最贫困的儿童
summary: The country’s child poverty rate is one of the highest in Europe — and it’s barely changed in 20 years. Will an ambitious bet on universal childcare make a difference?

title: El auge económico de España no ayuda a sus niños más pobres
title_cn: 西班牙的经济繁荣并没有帮助最贫困的儿童
summary: España quiere invertir miles de millones para combatir la pobreza infantil y la exclusión social

title: Trump Says Iran Blockade ‘Incredible’ as Pump Prices Keep Rising
title_cn: 特朗普称伊朗封锁“令人难以置信”，汽油价格持续上涨
summary: President Donald Trump said he was sticking with a naval blockade of Iranian ports amid concerns the vital Strait of Hormuz would not reopen anytime soon.

title: Trump Signs Bill Ending DHS Shutdown | Balance of Power: Late Edition 04/30/2026
title_cn: 特朗普签署结束国土安全部关闭的法案权力平衡：最新版 04/30/2026
summary: "Balance of Power: Late Edition" focuses on the intersection of politics and global business. On today's show, Leon Panetta, former US Defense Secretary and former CIA Director, criticizes Secretary Hegseth's political tone in congressional testimony, arguing lawmakers have a duty to scrutinize defense spending. Kevin Book, Managing Director at ClearView Energy Partners, says oil markets are reacting to "uncertainty" tied to both White House policy and tensions in the Persian Gulf. Chris Swonger, President and CEO of the Distilled Spirits Council & Responsibility.org, says President Donald Trump’s pledge to remove a 10% tariff on UK spirits would “inject vitality” into the industry. (Source: Bloomberg)

title: Greer Discusses ‘Board of Trade’ in Call With China’s He Lifeng
title_cn: 格里尔与中国何立峰通话讨论“贸易委员会”
summary: US Trade Representative Jamieson Greer said American officials discussed a possible “Board of Trade” in a call with Chinese Vice Premier He Lifeng Thursday, casting it as a tool that could help manage economic ties between the two nations.

title: Trump Signs Permit for Oil Pipeline Echoing Keystone XL
title_cn: 特朗普签署石油管道许可证，呼应 Keystone XL
summary: US President Donald Trump on Thursday signed a presidential permit authorizing the Bridger Pipeline expansion project meant to carry Canadian crude to Wyoming — the latest in years of back-and-forth over oil pipelines linking the countries.

title: Trump Nominates Saphier for Surgeon General, Pulls Means
title_cn: 特朗普提名萨菲尔为卫生局局长，并采取措施
summary: President Donald Trump pulled the nomination of wellness entrepreneur Casey Means to be US surgeon general and named Nicole Saphier, a radiologist, to replace her.

title: Tariff Cut Would Boost US-UK Whiskey Trade: Swonger
title_cn: Swonger：关税削减将促进美英威士忌贸易
summary: Chris Swonger, President and CEO of the Distilled Spirits Council and President and CEO of Responsibility.org, says President Donald Trump’s pledge to remove a 10% tariff on UK spirits would “inject vitality” into the industry, boosting trade and giving producers greater predictability between two “uniquely intertwined” whiskey markets. The President's announcement came following King Charles’s visit to the US, though the tariff rollback has not yet been implemented. He speaks with Joe Mathieu on the late edition of Bloomberg’s "Balance of Power." (Source: Bloomberg)

title: Trump Order Pushes Fixed-Price Contracts in Federal Agencies
title_cn: 特朗普命令在联邦机构推行固定价格合同
summary: President Donald Trump ordered federal agencies to make fixed-price agreements the default vehicle for government purchasing, shifting away from cost-reimbursement contracts that he said can lead to runaway spending.

title: Expert: Gasoline Could Rise Another 20-30 Cents
title_cn: 专家：汽油可能再涨20-30美分
summary: Kevin Book, Managing Director at ClearView Energy Partners, says oil markets are reacting to "uncertainty" tied to both White House policy and tensions in the Persian Gulf, as the closure of the Strait of Hormuz pushes crude into triple digits. He warns gasoline prices could rise another 20 to 30 cents and says shortages are already emerging in cooking fuels for Asian importers, with global shortfalls possible within weeks to months. He speaks with Joe Mathieu on the late edition of Bloomberg's "Balance of Power." (Source: Bloomberg)

title: More Bombing Won't Move Iran: Panetta
title_cn: 帕内塔：更多轰炸不会让伊朗动摇
summary: Leon Panetta, former US Defense Secretary and former CIA Director, criticizes Secretary Hegseth's political tone in congressional testimony, arguing lawmakers have a duty to scrutinize defense spending. He warns the standoff in the Strait of Hormuz is damaging both the Iranian and US economies—driving up oil, food and fertilizer prices. Asked whether additional strikes would move the needle, Panetta says negotiations are "the only way" the conflict will ultimately end. He speaks with Joe Mathieu on the late edition Bloomberg's "Balance of Power." (Source: Bloomberg)

title: UK Tempers Hopes of US Reset Despite King’s Royal Charm-Fest
title_cn: 尽管有国王的皇家魅力盛宴，英国还是缓和了美国重启的希望
summary: King Charles III left Washington with the same goodwill from Donald Trump that greeted him when he arrived three days earlier as the president hailed him as “the greatest king,” adding “we need more people like that in our country.”

title: How the US Government Plans to Refund Billions in Tariffs
title_cn: 美国政府计划如何退还数十亿关税
summary: When the Supreme Court struck down President Trump’s tariffs, it triggered a $166 billion refund process. On today’s Big Take podcast: the logistics of that payout and how soon businesses can expect relief.

title: Trump Says US Removing Scotch Tariffs After UK King’s Visit
title_cn: 特朗普表示英国国王访问后美国将取消苏格兰威士忌关税
summary: US President Donald Trump said he would be removing some whiskey tariffs following a visit from King Charles III, a move that delivers a major trade concession to the UK.

title: How US Plans To Refund $166 Billion In Tariff Revenue
title_cn: 美国计划如何退还 1660 亿美元关税收入
summary: When the Supreme Court struck down President Trump’s tariffs, it triggered a $166 billion refund process. On today’s Big Take podcast Bloomberg’s Laura Curtis and David Gura discuss how that’s playing out and why some companies might skip out on refunds altogether.  (Source: Bloomberg)

title: Trump Says 'Incredible' Hormuz Blockade Is Working
title_cn: 特朗普称“令人难以置信的”霍尔木兹封锁正在发挥作用
summary: President Donald Trump says Iran's economy is crashing because of the Strait of Hormuz blockade during remarks to reporters at the White House. (Source: Bloomberg)
